summary: Completed testing of credit system, phone number purchasing, SMS sending, unread messages, message ordering, and dark mode fixes. Backend: 8/8 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit system, phone number purchasing, SMS sending, and unread messages all working correctly. Dark mode styling verified on Dashboard, Phone Numbers, Analytics, and Inbox pages.

credit_system.GET /api/credits/balance: PASS - Returns org credit balance (16,220 credits)
credit_system.GET /api/credits/history: PASS - Returns transaction history with credits_delta field

phone_number_purchase.POST /api/phone-numbers/purchase (org_ad: PASS - Returns 400 'Cannot purchase numbers without an organization'
phone_number_purchase.credit_deduction_verified: PASS - Transaction history shows -40 credits per phone number purchase

sms_sending.POST /api/contacts/{id}/send-sms: PASS - Deducts 1 credit per SMS (TEXT_COST_CREDITS rounded up)
sms_sending.insufficient_credits: PASS - Returns 402 when org has insufficient credits

unread_messages.GET /api/messages/unread: PASS - Returns {count, messages} with client info

inbox_message_ordering.chronological_order: PASS - Messages displayed oldest on TOP, newest on BOTTOM (07:16 PM -> 07:33 PM)

inbox_unread_indicators.sidebar_badge: PASS - [data-testid='inbox-unread-badge'] shows red badge with count when > 0
inbox_unread_indicators.client_green_dots: PASS - [data-testid='unread-dot-{id}'] shows green pulsing dot on clients with unread messages
inbox_unread_indicators.polling: PASS - DashboardLayout polls messagesApi.getUnread every 15 seconds

dark_mode_fixes.dashboard_stats_cards: PASS - Cards have dark:bg-*-950/40 variants for dark backgrounds
dark_mode_fixes.phone_numbers_buy_card: PASS - 'Buy New Phone Numbers' card has dark background (not blue-50/white)
dark_mode_fixes.analytics_tips_cards: PASS - Tips cards have dark backgrounds with readable text
dark_mode_fixes.main_content: PASS - Main content area has dark:bg-zinc-950 background

api_verification.POST /api/phone-numbers/purchase (no org: 400 Bad Request - 'Cannot purchase numbers without an organization'

notes.sms_cost: 1 credit per SMS (TEXT_COST_CREDITS = 0.316, rounded up to 1)
notes.unread_count: Currently 0 unread messages (all messages have been read)

mocked_apis.note: All endpoints are live - no mocking
